storyInfo: Mantra cuts off the Yurodstvo's influence and awakens the miners with Vetochki's help. Raidian intercepts military communications, revealing that the Armies are slaughtering miners in the Far North to cover up the truth. Mantra then sends a broadcast and exposes everything.

attributes.content: Using Originium Arts is not the hard part of the combat.
Red and black mist fill the air. The white silhouette within does not speak or move, not even the fringes of its clothes.
It does not dodge or fight back, simply existing there in silence, allowing the barriers around it to wither away.
A void, a vortex that devours everything.
You are...
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: The scenes in the cognitive realm continue to flicker. They return to where they began.
A wilderness of unknown name or location. One could call it—
Sargon.
Why... why would this happen...?
attributes.name: Pleading Voice

attributes.content: Catastrophe has destroyed our home, why must war take our lives as well?
attributes.name: Pleading Voice

attributes.content: Padishah, silent and wise...
attributes.name: Pleading Voice

attributes.content: Hear my prayer, and comfort...
attributes.name: Pleading Voice

attributes.content: My pain.
attributes.name: Pleading Voice

attributes.content: ...Futile.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Search as you might in my consciousness, you will never create a vision that makes me choose to sleep in the void.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: You ■■... Padishah.
attributes.name: Yurodstvo

attributes.content: A Padishah. This is your past.
attributes.name: Mantra?

attributes.content: Your people sought comfort from you, but you would not even grant them an illusion, though it would have taken you little effort.
attributes.name: Mantra?

attributes.content: It's not comfort, it's just a lie.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: A sweet dream cannot shaken the ancient, corrupt royalty.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I left that place, fled of my own accord.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Indeed, you are not shaken.
attributes.name: Mantra?

attributes.content: Your voice...
attributes.name: Mantra?

attributes.content: You cannot become the source of the voice, Yurodstvo. You cannot become... 'me'.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Because I cannot speak, and because you're simply—
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: 'An Echo.'
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: 'People see in me the reflection of their perception and expectation.'
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: That's how you come to be.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: But to you, and to my own folly...
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I have no expectation.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: You are strong...
attributes.name: Yurodstvo

attributes.content: You have not been tried or baptized, yet you wield power almost the same as mine.
attributes.name: Yurodstvo

attributes.content: Yet you have neglected your power, this gift... you should have used it to proselytize and lead your people.
attributes.name: Yurodstvo

attributes.content: What made you leave your palace? What made you give up on power and become weak?
attributes.name: Yurodstvo

attributes.content: I realized...
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Knowledge is more lasting than authority. The truth is stronger than lies.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: And you...
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: You have spurred them onto a path of destruction, to die upon this frozen soil.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Why?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Soft laughter ripples through the air.
It is revelation. It is ■■. It is proselytization. It is sacrifice.
attributes.name: Yurodstvo

attributes.content: The land is about to undergo drastic changes. Those who are not strong will be destroyed.
attributes.name: Yurodstvo

attributes.content: Therefore, I nurtured a spark, making it strong, making it spread.
attributes.name: Yurodstvo

attributes.content: It will burn all that is impure, and all shall be born again within.
attributes.name: Yurodstvo

attributes.content: Mantra is certain she can kill it. In the realm of the mind, it will take little more effort than snuffing out a candle.
But what will killing it do? She is unsure. Besides, is there victory to be gained when your foe never engaged?
Stop wasting time, Yurodstvo.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Cease your influence on the people here, and let them leave with me.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Otherwise, Ursus will soon need a new Yurodstvo.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: No... no...
attributes.name: Yurodstvo

attributes.content: Your past is thick and long, ■■.
attributes.name: Yurodstvo

attributes.content: But it must be there, somewhere...
attributes.name: Yurodstvo

attributes.content: Your pain, the pain that you ■■ hide from...
attributes.name: Yurodstvo

attributes.content: There was no time for Mantra to react. A split second of hesitation is enough to cause a crack in the cognitive realm that she used all her strength to maintain.
She realizes her error almost instantly, but countless responses are already coming from outside the realm.
I accept.
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: I... I accept.
attributes.name: Frail Miner

attributes.content: I accept. I have long accepted.
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: I can eat straw, moss, drink snow water with gravel mixed in, until my stomach is full, and I shall not hunger. Not anymore.
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: See? Death is not more terrible than living.
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: At the end of her vision, Yurodstvo is white and slender, not a trembling apparition, nor a hunched old woman.
Whatever its appearance, it will continue to exist, as long as a single person believes in it.
The cause is not here. It is somewhere else.
Time starts flowing again. Mantra looks around, and her reason and emotion fight a war in her head, arguing about whether to try to fix the error, or beat a retreat.
Soon, she makes up her mind.
Elysium.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Right here!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: I need you to use thermal imaging to mark the location from the outside. Connect me to every miner here.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Can you do it?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Of course—
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: You got it!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: The woman's cold voice appears in every miner's head.
The instant that the connection is made, she realizes that these people can no longer endure any more shocks from mental Arts.
She can only keep out Yurodstvo for so long. Time is of the essence.
Perhaps this will be cruel to you. But I believe it's necessary to reveal the truth.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: If this exodus began out of despair and manipulation, then you should at least decide your own ending.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Who's... talking?
attributes.name: Frail Miner

attributes.content: How did I end up back here...?
attributes.name: Frail Miner

attributes.content: We're not here! We ran away with Rankin—we cut out the chips and got away!
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: This isn't real.
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: You're half-correct. This is not the truth of the present, but of the past.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: You killed the one on the ground. Yes or no?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Yes, yes! We killed him... Rankin killed him!
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: I thought Rankin was a hero. He said he would take us to a place where the Infected won't be looked down on, but he abandoned us in the end...
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: So you validated the truth of this scene.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I was there! I saw it. We killed and defiled our own soul...
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: Look again.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Tell me. Who is it?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Nadia, Vetochki's babushka. Everyone in the mines respected her, even the guards.
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: You respected her too. In the way that you respect your elders, or in the way that you respect a statue of a god?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: There's little difference, if you live to her age in the mines.
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: She stood among you. She joined the revolt.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: No, she didn't. She wasn't there... no one would ask an old woman to fight.
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: She's here? Who is she looking at? Is she mourning the fallen? Why would she mourn a murderer?
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: Because it was she who killed him.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: Rankin and your group never killed the last one who fell.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: What killed him was his hubris, and the one who created the illusion, making you blame yourself for his death.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: 'Yurodstvo.'
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Vetochki stands by the door. She wants to leave, but her feet will not move. She wants to look straight ahead, but she does not have the courage.
She can only look down at the watch in her hand, watching the hands tick and tock, moving to the next number.
What time is it? Which one is the hour hand, and which one is the minute hand? What about the extra one?

attributes.text: Mama said not to sleep in the snow. You'll get cold and pass out, and heavy snow can kill.
Rankin said not to doze off in the mines. You'll faint if the air is stale, and air that you can't see will burn.
But this isn't the snow or the mines. Can we sleep here, rest here?

attributes.content: Who can...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Save us?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.text: Babushka is gone. It's not Babushka Nadia standing there.
Not here. Rest, but not in someone else's home. Sleep, but not because you've lost the strength to live.

attributes.content: Don't sleep. Don't rest.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: We'll...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Save ourselves.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: She steadies the hastily-forged shield. The bell that she rang to warn the others to evacuate the mines hangs from it.
Vetochki swings her pickaxe and rings it again.
...So she's really the Yurodstvo?
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: I heard you worship her like the Yurodstvo.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: She's the Yurodstvo... she saved us! It all makes sense now.
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: She comforted us, shared our pain... she was always with us.
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: Where were you back then?
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: Then she should save you now.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: The miners look to the Yurodstvo. It stands silent like a statue.
Maybe we sinned too much.
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: No.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: The victimizer, the one who deceived and caused pain, wants the victim to endure and submit. It has always been so. You do not see any path other than to obey.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: It's not your fault.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Do you mean that we can still be saved?
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: Oh, shut it, Vasya. Does it even matter now?
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: Yes, you can be saved.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: If you leave here and continue your journey.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Choose to live, when living may be worse than dying.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Hah. Get lost.
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: I thought you were going to say something new. If that's all, then I would rather die with my corpse intact, and I'm sure everyone else—
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: Bells? Who's ringing the bells?
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: It's Vetochki...
attributes.name: Pious Miner

attributes.content: Sounds like someone has made a choice.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Vetochki silently rings the bell, even though it does not sound the way it used to.
She rings it again and again, until someone stands up.
Is our shift over?
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: Our shift's over.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: I want to leave here.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: I want to go home...
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: More and more people stand up from the ground, step away from the walls, and their figures begin to drown out the white at the end of the house.
The Yurodstvo's figure trembles, passing through Mantra and the people standing up in the house.
It comes before Vetochki.
Child.
attributes.name: Yurodstvo

attributes.content: Vetochki looks down and does not answer the call.
She continues to ring the bell, until everyone is roused, and a dazed smile appears on their faces.
Spasibo, Vetochki.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: Go back, Vetochki. Don't stay here too long.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: Vetochki—
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: No, I...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: I'm not going back.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Vetochki?
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: Vetochki gazes straight ahead—her companions stop smiling, and the figure of Yurodstvo is now nearly transparent.
She said, no.
We're not going back.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: We'll leave, and we'll live.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Until living, isn't the only thing, we care about, anymore.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: They look so much better now.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Are you alright, Mantra?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: This is Mantra.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: The communication has concluded. The miners have been freed from the Yurodstvo's control.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: You defeated the Yurodstvo?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I wouldn't say that. It was the result of their own effort. The Yurodstvo has disappeared, and I was unable to track it.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: We have more important matters to attend to now.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: The Armies...
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: They're here.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Report, Elysium.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: No hostiles within five klicks in the direction we're traveling. We can stay the course.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: The road ahead should be easier once we're out of this stretch of tundra.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Good to hear. Thank you, Elysium.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: There's bad news too, though. If the enemy isn't in front, they're probably behind us.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Watch your six, Amiya.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: I will.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: The cannonfire is drawing closer...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The group can't move any faster.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Even worse, we have no idea where they are.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: We need more information, Amiya. At least, we need to know how they're moving.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: You want to intercept military comms? Can you do that?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I'm familiar with Ursine military encryption methods, but it's been a while and it'll take time for me to identify the frequency that they're using.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Why are you looking at me like that?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Alright alright. Want me to leak even more classified information than I already have? Well, I can't guarantee it will help...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: But if we both live to stand before a military tribunal, I'll testify that all you did was purely in self-defense.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Your jokes could use some work, Sergeant.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I never said it was a joke. Please, consider lowering your expectations.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: They're low enough. Just tell me the frequency, then... 'keep quiet.'
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Uh, I'll write it down.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Found it. Thank you.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Tracing signal... switching to active... ship-mounted radio? Let me see...
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: '...rebellious Infected miners at large in the Far North...'
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.text: 'The Infected have engaged in large-scale massacres, causing significant civilian casualties. A large number of armed Infected are now heading to Deity Grypherburg.'
\n\n'The Fourth Army hereby answers the call of duty to suppress the insurrection in order to protect Deity Grypherburg and the people.'
\n\n'The operation will be carried out swiftly. Citizens are advised to remain calm and cooperative.'

attributes.content: What? Their shamelessness leaves you at a loss for words?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I'm unsurprised.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Sounds like they'll at least avoid the nomadic cities, but we should monitor civilian communications just in case... anyone have a map?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Not on me. I'll get it—
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I have it here.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Can I, listen to, what you're listening to?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: I want to know, about the other, mines...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Are we, the only ones, who left? Were there, others...?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: What they say on the radio isn't true, Vetochki.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I-I know!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Just wanted to know, if they're safe. Can we?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: It's true that radio broadcasts from the mines could be a source of information. Thank you, Vetochki.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Lieutenant Gorchekova, please mark on the map any nomadic cities in the path of the Armies' heading.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Wait... the signal has been changed...
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Military channel. That one just now was on civilian channels. Now they're sharing internal communications with other units.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: What...?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: 'Purged?'
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: They're purging...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Don't listen, Vetochki!
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Raidian tries to cover her ears, but the girl shakes her head.
The next message comes through after a brief silence.
Names of places mixed with static are sent back one after another from the terminal. Some are familiar, some are not. No one dares imagine what is happening on the other side.
A name. Just a name.
That's enough. Turn it off.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: We're not getting any more information... turn it off.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: No... no...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: I want to know... I want, to know.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: They're... our friends.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: The terminal's playback is like a bland, looping song.
The aurora sways in the night sky, a beautiful curtain that shuts out the screaming happening elsewhere on this tundra.
It is a long night.
...I understand, Your Imperial Majesty. I always have.
attributes.name: Grand Duchess Elisabeth

attributes.content: I understand your kindness. But no one has ever been respected for kindness...
attributes.name: Grand Duchess Elisabeth

attributes.content: What will happen to a nation, when it loses the energy that is its lifeblood?
attributes.name: Grand Duchess Elisabeth

attributes.content: Either it becomes livestock whose survival depends on the whims of others, or it must plunder the others first.
attributes.name: Grand Duchess Elisabeth

attributes.content: This is not the desire of the Armies... it is the desire of Ursus.
attributes.name: Grand Duchess Elisabeth

attributes.content: Ursus must not be weak. If she becomes weak, we must cut away what is weak, or the others will fall upon her in an instant.
attributes.name: Grand Duchess Elisabeth

attributes.content: All of this to say...
attributes.name: Grand Duchess Elisabeth

attributes.content: Silence can be such a difficult thing.
attributes.name: Grand Duchess Elisabeth

attributes.content: Grand Duchess Elisabeth tosses the letter with the State Council's seal into the fireplace.
The flames rise with a soft hiss, then all is quiet again.
Vetochki... calm down and listen to me.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Don't be afraid... don't give up. We can make it. We'll take everyone out of this place.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I want to leave...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: But, 'massacre'... killing people? They're trying to... shut everyone up?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: They used to do it, with butter, and coffee. Then, with whips, and death.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Papa and Mama, didn't keep quiet, so they're... dead.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Vetochki...
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: But what if, we're dead, even if, we keep quiet?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: The mining districts, what we heard... they're all dead? But we're, the only ones, who know.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Shouldn't more people know, before we're, silenced too?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: They can't, kill everyone.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Can they?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: You're right. But sending a message would reveal our position to the nearby Army...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: We...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Eloysius swallows her words. She wanted to be the voice of cold reason, but she cannot say the words.
Vetochki is right.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: We can't let them bury everything that happened here.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: You've just been through a hard fight, Mantra.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: There's no need to worry. It's my duty.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: But I can't NOT worry...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: You didn't want to come to the north, or reveal your Arts. There must be reasons for that, whether it's a past you didn't want to expose, or...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Rhodes Island won't place undue burdens on our operators. I don't know what you went through here, but I know it takes great courage to overcome it.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Thank you for your understanding, Amiya. But I no longer need to avoid it, for I've left it behind.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: We'll reveal the tragedy that happened here, and expose their plot to all.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: A-Alright!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: And we have a witness.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Let's begin.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Calibration complete... how are you feeling?
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Good.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: We'll expand the area, then. Raidian?
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: One moment. Maybe I can make use of the magnetic storms. The electrical signals carried in the noise...
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: How are you feeling now, Mantra?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I can hear more now.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: 'More' is a vague answer. She not only hears more, she hears further, hears more details—
She hears the battleship's tracks rumbling across the tundra, the screams that not even Originium engines and guns can drown.
She hears parents speaking southern Ursine dialects, kissing their children goodnight; couples whispering words of love on the balcony before going inside, the curtains left open.
She hears a radio program in the Northern Tundra, interrupted from time to time by the magnetic storms; an old man falling asleep stroking a cloudbeast in his arms in a nursing home...
She feels as though she can hear everything, and she knows she has to interrupt.
'Comrades—'
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Mantra suddenly realizes that she should not be the one saying the words.
At least, not the only one.
Vetochki.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Y-Yes?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: These are your words.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Say them with me.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: But I, don't speak, clearly—
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: You can do it.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I, I—
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: 'Comrades in the mines and cities.'
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: 'C-Comrades, in the mines, and cities.'
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: 'We come from the Far North.'
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: 'We come from... the Far North.'
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: 'We are being slaughtered.'
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: 'We are b-being...'
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Comrades, in the mines, and cities. We are hunted miners from the Far North.
We are still alive, but we are being slaughtered.
We did not betray Ursus.
Ursus abandoned us.
I-I did it!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: You did it.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Now...
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I might need some help.
attributes.name: Mantra
